title: Treacle Delight
description: A savory and creamy Thai dish featuring treacle, reduced to a rich sauce for a solo-dinner treat.
instructions: Chop the chicken breast into small pieces.
Peel and mince the garlic cloves, and thinly slice the Thai chili peppers.
In a wok or large skillet, heat the oil over medium-high heat. Add the minced garlic and chili peppers, cook until fragrant and slightly softened.
Add the shredded shiso leaves to wilt, about 1 minute.
Deglaze with fish sauce to enhance flavors, followed by sugar. Stir continuously to prevent burning.
Reduce the mixture by half while stirring for a smoother texture, then add treacle and reduce until reduced to approximately one third of its volume.
Add the corn starch water mixture all at once, stirring continuously to avoid lumps forming.
Simmer until thickened to desired consistency. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve immediately over the cooked chicken pieces for a creamy and savory Thai dish.
